title: workflow-participant-runtime-identity-v1
description: Shared workflow, participant, and runtime-session identity contract for Basidiocarp tools. First producer: Volva execution-session surfaces. First consumer: Canopy workflow linkage and operator read models.

workflow_id.description: Stable workflow or task-scoped identity shared across tools.

participant_id.description: Stable participant identity for the actor attached to the workflow edge.

runtime_session_id.description: Execution-host runtime session identity when the producer can expose one.

project_root.description: Canonical repository or workspace root for the workflow scope.

worktree_id.description: Git worktree identifier when the workflow is scoped to one worktree.

host_ref.description: Execution host or adapter identity, for example 'volva:anthropic'.

backend_ref.description: Concrete backend identity when the host exposes one, for example 'anthropic-api'.
